questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "worst"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "expensive"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "cheaper"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "faster"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "slower"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "taller"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "shorter"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "similar"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "different"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "popular"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "crowded"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "comfortable"?
Choose the best word: He is _____ than his brother.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He is taller than his brother." — từ đúng là "taller" (cao hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This road is _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This road is shorter." — từ đúng là "shorter" (ngắn/thấp hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The two cars are _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The two cars are similar." — từ đúng là "similar" (tương tự).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The twins are quite _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The twins are quite different." — từ đúng là "different" (khác nhau).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Football is the most _____ sport.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Football is the most popular sport." — từ đúng là "popular" (phổ biến).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The city is more _____ now.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The city is more crowded now." — từ đúng là "crowded" (đông đúc).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This chair is more _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This chair is more comfortable." — từ đúng là "comfortable" (thoải mái).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Math is more _____ for me.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Math is more difficult for me." — từ đúng là "difficult" (khó).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This book is more _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This book is more interesting." — từ đúng là "interesting" (thú vị).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Spring is the most _____ season.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Spring is the most beautiful season." — từ đúng là "beautiful" (đẹp).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The new building is more _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The new building is more modern." — từ đúng là "modern" (hiện đại).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This is the most _____ temple.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This is the most ancient temple." — từ đúng là "ancient" (cổ xưa).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: An elephant is ___ than a dog.
Complete the sentence: This is the ___ film I've ever seen.
Complete the sentence: Maths is ___ than English for me.
Complete the sentence: She is the ___ student in class.
Complete the sentence: Today is ___ than yesterday.
questions.explanation: Short adjective comparative doubles the consonant.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: A car is ___ expensive than a bike.
questions.explanation: Use 'more' for comparative of long adjectives.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: This is the ___ book in the shop.
Complete the sentence: My bag is ___ as yours.
Complete the sentence: Traffic is ___ on Mondays.
Complete the sentence: Russia is the ___ country in the world.
Which English word means "tệ nhất"?
Which English word means "đắt"?
Which English word means "rẻ hơn"?
Which English word means "nhanh hơn"?
Which English word means "chậm hơn"?
Which English word means "cao hơn"?
